name: How much is my broken leg from work worth in a comp claim here in Utah?
description: Covers medical, 2/3 lost wages, permanency; calculate via wage/impairment.[1][2]

mainEntity.name: How much is my broken leg from work worth in a comp claim here in Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Covers medical, 2/3 lost wages, permanency; calculate via wage/impairment.[1][2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Value depends on medical costs, lost wages (2/3 of average weekly wage), and permanent impairment rating; no fixed formula but temporary total disability pays while off work.[1][2] Utah's no-fault system covers these without suing employer.[1] Key factors: Wage at injury time; duration off work; doctor-rated permanent loss. Death benefits for dependents if fatal.[5] Practical guidance: Track all bills and pay stubs; get impairment evaluation. Use attorney for max settlement. Consult for personalized estimate based on records.[2]
